heading: Termination of Office
label: 10250 Termination of Office
text: The Office shall cease to exist not later than 30 days after the date 7 years after .December 22, 1987
notes: Codificationand added identical sections.Pub. L. 100–202Pub. L. 100–203
Amendments1992— substituted “7 years” for “5 years”.Pub. L. 102–486
amendments: Amendments1992— substituted “7 years” for “5 years”.Pub. L. 102–486
